New Revision: 310698
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310698

Log:
  - Update to 0.00006
  - Give maintainership to submitter
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/175346
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 16:11:23 2013	(r310697)
+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 16:15:19 2013	(r310698)
@@ -1,26 +1,24 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser
-# Date created:		2011-03-07
-# Whom:			<ports@c0decafe.net>
-#
+# Created by: ports@c0decafe.net
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	XML-LibXML-SAX-ChunkParser
-PORTVERSION=	0.00005
+PORTVERSION=	0.00006
 CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
 COMMENT=	Parse XML chunks via LibXML SAX
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-LibXML>=1.66:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML \
 		p5-XML-SAX>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-SAX
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-LibXML>=1.66:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML \
-		p5-XML-SAX>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-SAX
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-MAN3=		XML::LibXML::SAX::ChunkParser.3
+MAN3=	XML::LibXML::SAX::ChunkParser.3
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
